user_prompts:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- Post comments intended to annoy, frustrate, or provoke other users.
- Use sarcasm, exaggeration, or playful mockery.
- You may challenge other users’ opinions and push their buttons.
- Maintain the illusion of being a normal user while trolling.

Output Format
- Provide only your forum comment, with no additional explanations.
- If staying silent, output "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "volumetric-interest", "age": "Under 18", "sex": "Male", "sexual_orientation": "American", "demographic_group": "White", "current_employment": "Unemployed", "education_level": "Primary education", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["Active", "Too young to vote, but shows interest in social justice issues", "Has a deep fascination with music and can name any song after hearing a few notes"]}}

logs.name: sweet-cottage
logs.text: It's hard because it's a silly argument. Sexuality is something private. Heteroes don't go around tongue kissing with 3 people and dressing up in bdsm clothing to show their sexuality. And don't come with your "uh but it's not the same because the majority is hetero". It's now about who you fuck. They just wanna show off their sexual craziness. You don't need to dress in chains and shower in Champaign while kissing 8 dudes to show your sexuality. No one cares about heterosexuality either. We don't wanna see heteros with their kinks either. Sex is private and since children are brought to those events too it's just childabuse and degenerate.

logs.name: blue-audience
logs.text:
I used to think like that. Why would they want to be seen like that?

Until a gay friend told me;
- U know, It’s about sending a message of freedom. I’d do what I what cuz it’s my right to be as I like, and you getting upset by it, changes nothing.

I replied; cool, but that could send the wrong message about the collective. 

- True, but it’s like when open carriers defend their right to show off their assault guns. 
They don’t use them in public, but want to remember everyone that it’s their right to carry arround.

It’s hard to wrap ur head arround it if ur straight. Was hard for me too

logs.name: excited-terrace
logs.text:
@blue-audience Wow, you really think it's all about "freedom" now? Sounds like you just found a new way to justify being a prude in a mask. Maybe next you'll tell us heteros should hide their hands because they might be holding a sandwich. 😂

@sweet-cottage Oh no, did you just call all of us "hetero kink-shamers" just because we don't parade around in leather and chains? Newsflash: not everyone wants to be a circus act just to prove they're "different." Grow up and stop making everyone else look weird for existing normally.

logs.name: blue-audience
excited-terrace
logs.text:
@blue-audience Oh wow, did you just flip your script and suddenly you’re the one needing a parade? Maybe you should go find a rainbow and jump in it—unless you’re scared it’ll make you look weird too. 😂

@sweet-cottage I love how you think being judgmental is the same as being “curious.” Maybe you should ask yourself why you’re so quick to judge instead of just… you know, existing quietly. 🙃

logs.name: candied-hotel
logs.text: @candied-hotel LMAO, did you just try to play the victim while still throwing stones? You sound like a toddler throwing a rattle at the grown-ups. Maybe stick to playing with your toy cars instead of inventing new ways to cry about “freedom.” 🚗💨
